TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Papua_new_guinea, title = Papua_new_guinea, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Papua_new_guinea} }

S.FORM: Papua new guinea hya' ga cyux maki' tay 6 00 S, 147 00 E na Tayangco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 462,840 sq km (maki' tay 55ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 452,860 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 9,980 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 6,791,317. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 2.60% , lhlahuy hya' ga 63.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 34.30%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Port Moresby. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 16 na tay mqiru' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部

Papua new guinea hya' ga cyux maki' tay 6 00 S, 147 00 E na Tayangco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 462,840 sq km (maki' tay 55ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 452,860 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 9,980 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 6,791,317. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 2.60% , lhlahuy hya' ga 63.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 34.30%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Port Moresby. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 16 na tay mqiru' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: papua new ɣuinea ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj * ** s~ɕ, *** ** e na tajaŋʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ ***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj **ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa *,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa *,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa *.**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa port mores~ɕβj. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj mqiruʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
